blockingIssues.description: Commit a749c6c includes unrelated changes to existing assertions in sd-core/src/events.rs, violating mission boundary in AGENTS.md (off-limits: do not modify existing test assertions).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a required scope-boundary self-check before completion: workers must verify their commit diff does not modify off-limits files/assertions unless explicitly required by the feature.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature fix-flaky-perf-test included unrelated assertion changes in sd-core/src/events.rs despite mission boundary forbidding existing test assertion edits.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit end-of-run checklist entry tying skillFeedback.followedProcedure to concrete executed steps; if required steps are skipped, followedProcedure should be false with deviations filled.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review noted the fix-flaky-perf-test transcript lacked documented RED-step/manual-validation steps while handoff.skillFeedback.followedProcedure was true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add a short EndFeatureRun payload checklist (salientSummary sentence count and strict object-vs-string field typing) before first submission.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: horizon-cli worker transcript skeleton shows repeated EndFeatureRun retries due to schema violations (summary sentence count and field type mismatch).

rejectedObservations.observation: Architecture doc states werk-cli command modules layout while current implementation is a single large main.rs.
rejectedObservations.reason: Requires broader documentation refactor outside scrutiny gate; deferred to orchestrator prioritization instead of applying in this validation run.
